title: Home Page
description: This is an example of translation in en

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Playback · appearance · language · translation · updates · data · studio
settings.dataBackupLead: Your watchlist is stored locally in this browser profile. Export or import JSON from
settings.dataBackupTrail: — useful when moving machines or keeping a backup.
settings.dataDownloadsBody: Queue episodes from the watch page when this section is enabled and a folder is chosen. Direct progressive URLs save to disk; many sources use HLS (.m3u8), which is listed as failed until a transmux step exists. See docs/downloads-spike.md for limits.
settings.dataApiBody: Pings /api/me on the base URL from Playback → Server. Use this to verify your local or remote API is reachable before signing in on the Account page.
settings.telemetryBody: When enabled, AniVault records anonymous timing and load metrics. No stream URLs, credentials, or watch history are included. Optional HTTPS URL below sends JSON events when set.
settings.telemetryEndpointHelp: HTTPS URL, or http://localhost for dev. Empty = no upload (console only in dev).
settings.playbackSkipIntroHelp: How far the Skip intro button seeks (typical opening ~90s).
settings.offlineDownloadsHelp: Enable this, pick a writable folder, then use “Save for offline” on the watch page. Only one download runs at a time; comply with source terms and local law.
settings.labsBody: This space is being unvaulted — deeper tools, automation, and polish are on the way. Nothing to configure here yet; watch the changelog in Updates.

lists.title: My lists
lists.subtitle: Saved on this device. Search the catalog to add instantly, or paste a series ID.

browse.title: Series
browse.subtitle: Merged catalog probes — open Find shows for queries and filters.

schedule.title: Airing schedule
schedule.anilistBlurb: Upcoming episodes from AniList — times are local to this device. Not a licensor broadcast guarantee.
schedule.serverBlurb: Editorial calendar from your companion AniVault server.
schedule.localBlurb: Offline preview week. When online, AniList airing data loads automatically when the network allows.
schedule.empty: No upcoming entries in this window.

contextMenu.toastCopyPlaybackUnavailable: This stream URL cannot be copied (blob or offline source)

watch.playbackAssistsHint: Skip intro jumps forward by the seconds set in Settings → Playback (no provider markers). Episodes opens a quick jump list for this series.
watch.queueOfflineTitle: Add this episode to the offline queue (Settings → Data)
watch.queueOfflineNeedSettings: Enable offline downloads and choose a folder in Settings → Data
